source.origin: WYD classic / Origem Destiny local corpus

targetClient.evidence: Project target recorded in README.md; the supplied binaries do not embed an independently verified release label.

contract.unmappedTailEncoding: hex; omitted from an item only when all 12 bytes are zero

recoveredClientContracts.evidence: display index is mapped with index % 9 + 27 * floor(index / 9)
MSG_ShopList.List contains 27 entries displayed on a five-column grid

authority.scope: static client and NPC-template extraction only

merchantToReserved.limitation: No supplied authoritative server handler was used to prove the transformation; consumers must keep this mapping explicit as an inference.

tax.evidence: The client receives Tax in MSG_ShopList; neither ItemList nor the NPC template supplies an authoritative tax value.

transactions.note: This catalog does not authorize purchases, balances, prices at runtime, or inventory mutation.
